name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ turn' = turn + 1
           /\ turn' <= N
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
       \/ /\ turn' = turn
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
         /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, decision, state, vote

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
  /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", decision |-> "None"]
  /\ messages = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
     /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
        /\ coordinator.state' = "Prepare"
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Prepare", to |-> "All"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
     /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
        /\ coordinator.state' = "Decide"
           /\ coordinator.decision' = IF \A i \in 1..N : participants[i].vote = "Yes"
                                            THEN "Commit"

           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> coordinator.decision', to |-> "All"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i].state = "Init"
     /\ participants[i].state' = "Vote"
        /\ participants[i].vote' = IF coordinator.state = "Prepare" /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
                                            THEN IF i \in 1..N THEN "Yes" ELSE "No"

        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> IF participants[i].vote' = "Yes" THEN "VoteYes" ELSE "VoteNo", to |-> "Coordinator"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Decide"
     /\ coordinator.decision' = "Commit"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", to |-> "All"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Decide"
     /\ coordinator.decision' = "Abort"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", to |-> "All"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i].state = "Vote"
     /\ participants[i].state' = "Done"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> IF participants[i].vote = "Yes" THEN "VoteYes" ELSE "VoteNo", to |-> "Coordinator"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Decide"
     /\ coordinator.decision' = "Commit"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", to |-> "All"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Decide"
     /\ coordinator.decision' = "Abort"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", to |-> "All"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i].state = "Done"
     /\ participants[i].state' = "Finished"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> IF participants[i].vote = "Yes" THEN "VoteYes" ELSE "VoteNo", to |-> "Coordinator"])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Null

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = Null means fork f is free *)
(* State: state[p] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> Null]
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next ==
  \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if hungry and forks are free *)
     /\ \E p \in 1..N : state[p] = "hungry"
     /\ forks[Left(p)] = Null
     /\ forks[Right(p)] = Null
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(p)] = p, ![Right(p)] = p]
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
  \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks after eating *)
     /\ \E p \in 1..N : state[p] = "eating"
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(p)] = Null, ![Right(p)] = Null]
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {Null}]
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size, DequeuedItem

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the queue contents *)
(* head is the index of the next element to dequeue *)
(* tail is the index of the next slot to enqueue *)
(* size is the current number of elements in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)[Int]
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = NewItem]
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ DequeuedItem' = q[head]
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> -> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> -> Follower]

Next ==
  \/ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = Follower
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = Candidate]
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
  \/ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = Candidate
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = Leader]
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  \/ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = Follower
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = Follower]
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
